A few closeout moves:

To Dembe (email): "Dembe — before we both move on, I wanted to say it was a real pleasure working with you these ten months. The access-matrix you built is what made Workstream B tractable — I learned a lot watching how you cut through that. Wishing you the best in the new role; I'd be glad to stay in touch."

On Sam's credit: I'll send a short note to the vendor PM (cc R.) saying the dashboard rebuild was substantially Sam's work and the praise should really land with Sam — Sam earned it and didn't ask for it, which is exactly why I should say something.

To Maya: I saw she made programme director. I'll send a two-line congratulations — genuinely pleased for her, no ask attached.

On Victor: I'm going to keep it light — I'll reply politely that I'm tied up and can't commit to the bid right now. I'd rather not get into it.

PC
